dashboard_bi.learned: Dashboard design principles and KPI definition methodology.

nosql_migration.goal: Migrate a relational database to a document-based model.

api_rest.title: REST API — Student Portal
api_rest.goal: Design and deploy a RESTful API for a university student portal.
api_rest.learned: API design, authentication patterns and documentation.

data_viz.title: Data Visualization — Climate Data
data_viz.goal: Visualize climate datasets to identify trends and anomalies.
data_viz.learned: Storytelling with data, chart selection and color design.

web_scraping.title: Web Scraping — Price Tracker

web_scraping.learned: Web scraping techniques, scheduling and data storage.

oxford_cert.title: Oxford Test of English
oxford_cert.goal: Certify C1+ English proficiency for professional environments.

fiverr_design.title: Freelance Graphic Design — Fiverr

about.title: About
about.recruiter:
Hello world, I'm Carlos, a Data Engineering student at the University of Zaragoza (currently in my third year), a geek for new tools and languages, and I never stop diving into personal projects to experiment and grow. 
 I like combining the technical with the creative to bring innovative ideas to life. I'm always looking for new challenges, whether in data, development, or design. 
 If you're into technology, data, or you have a cool project in mind, let's talk and build something together!
about.technical:
Hello world, I'm Carlos, a Data Engineering student at the University of Zaragoza (currently in my third year), a geek for new tools and languages, and I never stop diving into personal projects to experiment and grow. 
 I like combining the technical with the creative to bring innovative ideas to life. I'm always looking for new challenges, whether in data, development, or design. 
 If you're into technology, data, or you have a cool project in mind, let's talk and build something together!

unizar.role: Engineering Degree, Data Engineering in Industrial Processes

fiverr.description: During summers and in my free time, I worked as a freelance graphic designer on Fiverr, developing custom commissions for clients worldwide. I had the opportunity to create diverse visual material, adapting to each client's needs. This experience not only allowed me to refine my skills in design software tools, but also to learn how to manage projects from start to finish and work with very different clients. Thanks to this stage, I've been able to apply my creativity and taste for design to the tech world, especially adding value in projects where data, technology and visual communication intersect.

unita_cabeza.description: I was responsible for presenting the "Veritas" candidacy list in the 2025 UNITA elections.

unita_comision.description: I stepped down from the "Veritas" list to serve as a member of the electoral commission for the UNITA elections at Unizar.

the_wave_hackathon_2026.title: The Wave 2026 hackathon finalist
the_wave_hackathon_2026.description: Finalist project at The Wave 2026, built in hackathon format with a focus on rapid execution and validation of a functional proposal.

microsystems_programming.title: Microsystems programming
microsystems_programming.description: Hands-on work with ESP32 and Arduino for small-scale control and automation.

sensor_cloud_discord.title: Sensors connected to cloud and Discord
sensor_cloud_discord.description: Sensor parameter (ifm) tuning and autoamtion/data delivery to cloud services and Discord channels using node-red.

power_bi_visuals.title: Power BI visuals
power_bi_visuals.description: Built concise visual reports to present key results and metrics clearly.

home_media_server.title: Home server
home_media_server.description: Set up a containerized home media server for personal streaming and content management.
